overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA: San Andreas Definitive Edition featuring the character CJ walking along a beachfront boardwalk at night, transitioning to a rainy urban street under a highway overpass. The clip showcases dynamic weather changes from clear to heavy rain as the character moves from a wooden boardwalk to street level.

events.description: character stops walking and looks up at the Beach House building facade
approaches stairs leading down from boardwalk to street level

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden boardwalk past illuminated storefronts, pausing briefly to look up at the building signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the boardwalk in the distance
pedestrian in green shirt visible in the distance near the palm trees

entered.detail: wooden plank walkway extending along the beachfront
multi-story building with vertical 'BEACH HOUSE' signage
storefront with red and green 'UGALADAJARA JEWELRY PLAZA' signage
yellow sidewalk sign advertising 'SALE ADULT BOOKS VIDEO'
large decorative hamburger prop on the boardwalk
tall street lamp with warm orange glow
palm trees visible in the distance along the beach

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wooden beach boardwalk at night, passing various tourist shops including a jewelry plaza and gift shop. The area is illuminated by warm street lamps and neon storefront signs. The character pauses briefly to look up at the Beach House building before continuing toward a stairway leading down from the boardwalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street under highway overpass in heavy rain

events.description: heavy rain begins falling suddenly as character descends the stairs
character reaches bottom of stairs and continues walking along the wet sidewalk

agents.ego_description: descending concrete stairs to street level and walking along the rainy sidewalk next to traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark suit and yellow cap walking ahead on the sidewalk
yellow taxi cab driving on the wet road with headlights on

entered.detail: concrete stairway leading down from boardwalk to street level
elevated highway bridge spanning across the street
brick building facade along the sidewalk
multi-lane asphalt road with wet surface reflecting lights
green dumpster and cardboard boxes on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character descends concrete stairs to street level as heavy rain suddenly begins to fall, creating a dramatic weather shift. The scene transitions to an urban street under a highway overpass, with wet asphalt reflecting streetlights and vehicles passing by. The character walks along the sidewalk following a pedestrian in a suit, with the camera capturing the rainy atmosphere and the overpass structure overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit beach boardwalk into a moody, rain-slicked urban street. It begins with the character walking past warm street lamps and glowing storefronts, including a jewelry plaza and gift shop, before pausing briefly to look up at the Beach House building. As the character approaches and descends a set of concrete stairs, the clear night suddenly shifts into a heavy downpour. The scene then opens onto a street level beneath a massive highway overpass, where the warm glow of the boardwalk is replaced by the cold reflections of streetlights on wet asphalt. Finally, the camera follows the character along the sidewalk behind a pedestrian in a suit, capturing the oppressive atmosphere of the rain under the concrete structure.
